name: Drake Baldwin
headline: Baldwin went 2-for-4 with a walk, a triple, a home run and four RBI in Monday's Grapefruit League game against the Rays.

name: Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
headline: Guerrero went 2-for-4 with a two-run homer, a walk and an additional run scored during Tuesday's 6-2 win over the Dodgers in Game 4 of the World Series.

name: Gleyber Torres
headline: Torres (groin) has been cleared to participate in all baseball activities.

name: Austin Riley
headline: Riley could be surprisingly active as a base stealer this season under the tutelage of new Atlanta baserunning coach Antoan Richardson.

name: Zachary Neto
headline: Neto (wrist) will play in Tuesday's Cactus League game against the Cubs.

name: James Wood
headline: Wood went 0-for-2 with a walk and a run scored in Friday's Grapefruit League game against the Mets.

name: Jo Adell
headline: Adell went 2-for-3 with a solo home run, two total runs and two total RBI in Wednesday's Cactus League game.

name: George Springer
headline: Springer went 2-for-3 with a solo home run in Friday's Grapefruit League game against the Cardinals.

name: Kazuma Okamoto
headline: Okamoto went 1-for-2 with a two-run home run in the Blue Jays' Grapefruit League game against the Mets.

name: Gabriel Moreno
headline: Moreno (forearm) expected to be available for the Diamondbacks' March 26 season opener versus the Dodgers.

name: Luis Arraez
headline: Arraez signed a one-year contract with the Giants.

name: Ernie Clement
headline: Clement signed a one-year, $4M contract.

name: Jeff McNeil
headline: McNeil (shoulder) started at second base and went 1-for-1 with a walk in Sunday's Cactus League loss to the Guardians.

name: Royce Lewis
headline: Lewis (side) is starting at third base and batting leadoff in Tuesday's Grapefruit League game against the Rays.

name: Heliot Ramos
headline: Ramos went 1-for-5 with a three-run home run in Friday's 6-3 win over the Rockies.

name: Jac Caglianone
headline: Caglianone went 1-for-3 with a solo home run in Tuesday's Cactus League loss to the Padres.

name: Jakob Marsee
headline: Marsee went 1-for-2 with two walks, a solo home run and a second run scored in Monday's Grapefruit League game.

name: Ethan Holliday
headline: Holliday will make his Rockies organizational debut with Single-A Fresno on Tuesday.

name: Eli Willits
headline: Willits went 3-for-4 with a walk, a run scored, two RBI and a stolen base for Single-A Fredericksburg.

name: Charlie Condon
headline: Condon's MLB debut is not imminent, despite a strong spring training.

name: Max Clark
headline: Clark was reassigned to minor-league camp Monday.

name: Tanner Bibee
headline: Bibee allowed three runs on three hits over three innings in Saturday's Cactus League start against the White Sox.

name: Joey Cantillo
headline: Cantillo allowed three runs on three hits and one walk while striking out six over 4.2 innings Friday.

name: MacKenzie Gore
headline: Gore allowed two hits and three walks while striking out three over two scoreless innings in Monday's Grapefruit League start.

name: Shane McClanahan
headline: McClanahan struck out seven and walked two without allowing a hit or a run in 3.2 innings Sunday.

name: Yoshinobu Yamamoto
headline: Yamamoto will start the Dodgers' March 26 season opener versus the Diamondbacks in Los Angeles.

name: Jhoan Duran
headline: Duran threw a clean inning during Friday's Grapefruit League game against the Orioles.

name: Griffin Jax
headline: Jax has given up one run on four hits with seven strikeouts and one walk across 4.2 spring innings.

name: Mason Miller
headline: Miller will serve as the Padres' closer in 2026.

name: Tyler Rogers
headline: Rogers signed a three-year, $37 million contract with the Blue Jays.

name: JoJo Romero
headline: Romero is expected to be among the relievers in the mix to close games for the Cardinals this season.

name: Mick Abel
headline: Abel gave up two earned runs over 3.1 innings in Thursday's Cactus League start.

name: Yusei Kikuchi
headline: Kikuchi (forearm) faced live hitters Wednesday in his first throwing session of spring training.

name: Matthew Liberatore
headline: Liberatore permitted two runs while striking out seven across five frames in Sunday's Cactus League start.

name: Jose Soriano
headline: Soriano will start Los Angeles' March 26 season opener against the Cubs.
